semantic_brief.brief: RCLDEF01 is radio calling-in point whose direction is not known. It is used as a radio calling-in point whose direction is not known. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: reference-defined.
